description_long: This is a small, fixed-wing airplane with a high-wing configuration and a sleek, streamlined fuselage. The exterior is primarily white with red accents along the nose, tail, and a stripe running the length of the body, complemented by gray details. The aircraft features a single propeller engine mounted at the nose, tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a nose wheel, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with multiple windows, suggesting a multi-seat arrangement. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the upper section of the fuselage, with no visible winglets or dihedral angles. The overall design is typical of general aviation aircraft used for personal, training, or small commuter flights.
description: A small, high-wing, single-propeller airplane with a white and red color scheme, tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted straight wings, red and white fuselage, and single propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, nose wheel, and symmetrical wing extension.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same high-wing and tail features, with clear visibility of the landing gear and windows.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the red vertical stabilizer.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
